text:
Yes - well ... it's a nice project to build a DIY lamp. I would prefer a DIY lamp on lower voltage and powered by DIY battery; carged with a solar pannel. - Less danger about electric shock and more fun about indipence from public power supply.
However: You made a start to using your ink. Great!

author: @snugglycrow496
text:
A Good Day Sir. Robert Murray Smith.


I'm Lenard Marquez a student from the Philippines. I watched many of your videos and also read some papers


Currently, me and my team wants to do a research about making usable graphene at home and making a quality battery out of graphene.


We are willing to use shear exfoliation and electro exfoliation as a method , and We are currently building the idea about making the baterry.


I humbly want to ask Sir. about your concent to use your methods and willing to use it as a reference to our study.I would like to have a paper of yours or any journal etc. for the reference purpose. Also, we would like to hear some of your advice about making a graphene battery. 


We are willing to have your help sir.


Thank you and Please , Feel Free to reply sir.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: The info is on the channel for folks to use mate so feel free - unfortunately I don't really have the time to get involved in other folks projects as i have rather a lot on myself - but good luck with it

replies.author: @snugglycrow496
replies.text: Robert Murray-Smith Okay thanks Sir ;) Best Of Luck to you Too Sir
